stories.title: Serena Williams Falls to Maya Joint in Emotional Wimbledon Return

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Serena Williams' Wimbledon comeback is over.

Maya Joint — ranked No. 87, on an 11-match losing streak — beat the 7-time champion 6-3, 6-7(6), 6-3.

Serena won the second set. Joint took the third.

44 years old. Still gave it everything. #Wimbledon2026

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Maya Joint: 20 years old. Ranked No. 87. On an 11-match losing streak.

Today she beat Serena Williams 6-3, 6-7(6), 6-3 on Wimbledon's Centre Court.

Tennis writes strange stories sometimes. #Wimbledon2026

article.headline: Serena Williams' Wimbledon Return Ends in the First Round — Maya Joint Beats Seven-Time Champion in Three Sets

stories.title: Shelton Stunned — Finnish Qualifier Virtanen Saves Match Point to End No. 4 Seed's Run

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Ben Shelton led 9-8 in the final-set supertiebreak.

One point from victory.

Otto Virtanen — Finnish qualifier — saved it. Then won the next two.

Virtanen def. Shelton 6-4, 3-6, 6-7(8), 6-2, 7-6(9). No. 4 seed out. #Wimbledon2026

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Otto Virtanen is the first Finnish man to defeat a top-5 seed at a Grand Slam in the Open Era.

He did it today at Wimbledon — stunning No. 4 Ben Shelton 6-4, 3-6, 6-7(8), 6-2, 7-6(9).

Historic. #Wimbledon2026 #ATPTour

article.headline: Shelton Stunned: Finnish Qualifier Virtanen Saves Match Point at 9-8 to End No. 4 Seed's Wimbledon

stories.title: Svitolina Exits — No. 8 Seed Falls to Compatriot Snigur in Day 2 Women's Upsets

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Elina Svitolina — No. 8 seed, two-time Wimbledon semi-finalist — lost in Round 1 to compatriot Daria Snigur 7-5, 6-2.

Snigur came back from 0-4 down in Set 1.

Svitolina's first R1 exit at Wimbledon since 2018. #Wimbledon2026

article.headline: Snigur's Comeback from 0-4 Ends Svitolina's Wimbledon — No. 8 Seed's First Round 1 Exit Since 2018

stories.title: Swiatek and Rybakina Survive Three-Set Scares in Day 2 Women's Action

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Swiatek: 6-1, 2-6, 6-3 vs Townsend.
Rybakina: 6-4, 1-6, 6-3 vs Boisson.

Neither seed looked comfortable in the second set. Both got through anyway.

Day 2 at Wimbledon — the top players surviving, not dominating. #Wimbledon2026

article.headline: Swiatek and Rybakina Both Need Three Sets — Top Seeds Survive But Are Not Yet Convincing

stories.title: Djokovic-Tsitsipas Suspended at Dusk — Day 3 Preview as Wimbledon Heats Up

x_posts.label: Post 5-1
x_posts.text:
Djokovic vs Tsitsipas was suspended for darkness last night. Resumes today.

Wednesday also brings:
→ Andreeva vs Krejčíková (Roland Garros champ vs Wimbledon champ)
→ Sinner vs Borges (R2)
→ FAA vs Prizmic

Best day of the tournament so far. #Wimbledon2026

x_posts.label: Post 5-2
x_posts.text:
Djokovic leads Tsitsipas in their head-to-head 12-2.

But Tsitsipas has pushed him to five sets twice at Roland Garros. They know each other.

Match continues Wednesday at Wimbledon. #Wimbledon2026 #ATPTour
